title: cremanthodium discoideum
intro: Cremanthodium discoideum, also known as the pale yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cremanthodium discoideum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
